title: Just because Margaret Sanger was racist doesn't make Planned Parenthood racist

transcript.text: Okay, hello. This video is about Planned Parenthood.
Just because Margaret Sanger was a racist doesn't mean Planned Parenthood is a racist institution.
People like to make connections with things and blow it way out of proportion and it doesn't make any sense.
It's like saying that the Ford Motor Company of today is racist because Henry Ford was a racist.
Planned Parenthood itself helps girls get abortions.
And if a girl wants to get an abortion, she shouldn't have help getting an abortion.
Somebody said, I saw a video where somebody said that Planned Parenthood will help black people.
And if you look at the statistics, black women who get pregnant get abortions more than white women who get pregnant.
So that maybe means that Planned Parenthood is racist because they help black people get abortions more than they help white people.
But it seems to me that black people are poorer than white people.
So maybe they're just helping them because they're poor, not because they're black.
I would want to help a poor person get an abortion more than someone who's not poor because they're not going to be able to provide for their baby as easily as a rich person.
Kids don't like being raised poor.
And so, let's just not make these connections.
There's lots of people who were racist just a few years ago.
That's just how it was.
Everybody was racist.
Sorry.
We have lots of homophobes right today.
We've got lots of crazy people.
But you don't want to compare, make somebody's legacy or something that somebody started, make that pollute what's going on today.
Stuff changes.
Everything changes.
Words change.
500 years ago, girl meant a boy.
I bet you that the N-word in 500 years will mean friend because the black people use it so much.
So, Planned Parenthood is good.
If somebody wants an abortion, we should help them get an abortion.
Otherwise, they'll just try and give themselves an abortion and end up bleeding to death or have some unqualified person give them an abortion and they'll get infected and die.
But, that's a whole other topic.
So, there you go.
That's that.
That's that.
